TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ci Sucang sinpu == O mama no Fotod ci Ci Sucang sinpu (Fr .Giger, Alfred. 1919-1970), o no Payleng wayfang dintokay Switzerland a tadamaanay tamdaw itiya ho. Onini a takaraway ko tireng, Padaka ko pising ato mata kasenangan a sinpu, tariktikay ko wakawak, o polong no kalakapahan 'orip mapacakat itini i pasawali, ngalef itiniay i Fotod kanatal Tao finacadan. Ci Ou tintosi (Bro. Buchel Augustin) 'ayaw no latosa no sici (1954 miheca) itira i Falangaw Tinsokiw patado ci Ci Sucang sinpu, caay ko ni haydaan no kafafaw, lonok sa paka Takao mikalic to tamina tayra i Fotod saan, itini i nengneng no Payrang, o macahiway komaenay to rengos ko finawlan, o makadalay a pala. O nisidayan a saying a nengnengen, o kalakapahan no sinpu o kakaolahan no Fotod a finawlan. Ira ko pinapina a saying to pisatamohong ato pisariko' ningra to no Fotod finacadan a lalosidan a masasi'ayaw to mato'asay, masasisongtol to ngoso' a matatakec pasyasing. Ikor no 80 mihecaan, o pihemak to kafana' to fa'elohay sa'etal to 500 mihecaan, polong no cikiw madadoedo miharateng: o picingcing ato papotalay a pitooran o maan ko sakatatiih no ponka no itiraay? Oci so'elinay mapadama ko pakoyocay a finacadan? Halo Taywan a masowal. Fangcal ko harateng no pasawali a tamdaw (mangalef I'ayaway a Tao a tamdaw) saki ci Ci Sucang sinpuan, caay koya ni patenakan ningra a pipa'orip ni Kristo a ratoh, oya nga'ayay a demak nonini kapah a tamdaw. Midama cingra to sakanga'ay no Tao finacadan, mapapalo to sofitay aci Ci Sucang sinpu, o ka'edesan pi'epecan no sifo itiya i, o kaketeran no Padaka ato sofitay o masamaanay hakiya? "Maedengay to ko pipafeli, caay to ko papafelien." O sawal ni Ou tintosi kai kalacitodongay ningra itiya i, kinapinapina masasitoc tonini a caayay pikihar, nawhani honihoni miala to dafong patayra i papotal, roma marketer to ci Ou tintosi tonini a demakan, Ci Sucang sinpu sato pa'afala saan, "O papafeli to ko Kawas titaanan." Sahatira saca ko paca'of. 60 mihecaan itiya, 'ayaw no Tingsokiwkay i saka tosa no Vatican a sa'opo o masimed ho, awaay ho ko mafana'ay to no Lating a pakayraan, o sifana' sa ko pido'edoan misacecay miwasil. Marikec ko sifana' a ma'edes, oni Ci Sucang sinpu pikerid to Misa mato mafohatay, midotoc to sowal no Tao tamdaw, sa'ayaw ni Ci Sucang sinpu i Lanyu a mafohat, pilayapan to epang itiya i, ano mitooray to ano kafahekaan? Mangalay sapilayapan, patodongen ni Ci Sucang sinpu pafeli cangraan. I nengneng ningra, ci Kristo o no 'alomanay tamdaw, awaay ko laloma'ay papotalay sanay pisiiked, o nipatadoan ningra malecaday to. Roma; mikihatiya cingra to lisin no Tao finacadan (tinako pifotingan, patefadan to tamina a lisin), oya caayay falicen a to'ek lekakawa doedo sa to no itiniay niyaro' a ponka ko pisalof. Ci Ci Sucang sinpu nai 1954 miheca itini i Lanyu patado ira ko 16 mihecaan ningra. Toya a yincumin (tano pacacoy sa ko fa'inayan no Tao finacadan) ni epecan a to'ek mihecaan itiya, palo niyah a salikaka saan ko nengneng ni Ci Sucang sinpu. Kinapinapina kanikawan to kakaenen ko Tao finawlan palada'en ni Ci Sucang sinpu, hadidi sa ko ca'of to finawlan: "Kako ko misakimokimoray." saan mitamorong. Papacakatan to kiwkay no Hongto i 1967 mihecaan, pakaynien ningra i rocok ko pihamham to lafan a mipa'edap, caay pina'on ko kamaro' i 'anengan a mapolin, o pinengneng no dotoc a mato'asay, o caayay ko nga'ayay saan. 1970 miheca 3 folad 10 romi'ad, saki salikaka no Tao a sowal, o kapadesan a romi'ad. Ci Ci Sucang sinpu padadaya misera to tatosaay fafahiyan tayra i saetip matayal, itira i Takao o nai Ciayiay misera to lafang a haya, to dafak, 50 ko mihecaan ningra itiya. pipaisingan makilim ko i tatirengan ningra ko calay, itiya masapinang to o sinpu ko tireng ningra, oya masalafiiay caay ka foti' matokato parakatay masetol ko kilang i lalan, ci Ci Sucang sinpu masera patayra i ngataay ising a mapatay, 50 ko mihecaan itiya. Onini a demak mapatayra to i pasawali, ngalef o itiraay i Tao a salikaka, mararom to maemin, polong no salikaka no Tinsokiw i Hongto mitolon tonini a demak, itiraay a sifo citodongay mingodo mitefad to fayfay mita'ong. Kahemekan kaolahen no itiraay i Lanyu a salikaka ci Ci Sucang sinpu "O mama no Lanyu" saan ko pingodo. Mahirateng nangra, onini nai Switzerland a tamdaw mikapotay palipahak ato mararom mikerid to kapadesan, miliyang to misamsamay ato miepecay, o nianan ko kanga'ayan nonini a sinpu ciherang, palowad to saka ci tari'an ato safaloco' no niyah. Kapatay ni Ci Sucang sinpu, matadem i Piwho saikoran no kiwkay, mapatireng ko ciwcika, o ngangan ato kasofocan ato kapatayan ko matiliday, away to ko maan. Milicay kako ci Wo tintosian: "O tadamaanay tamdaw cingra kiya? Mana hatini sa ko tadem ningra?" "O malawlaay ko katayni pinakay, awaayay ko maan a tamdaw cingra i." sahatira sa ko paca'of ni Wo tintosi.
S.PHON: == ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u == o~u mama no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u (fr .*i*ər, aɾfrəɬ~ɮ. ****-****), o~u no~u pajɾəŋ wajfaŋ ɬ~ɮinto~ukaj swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw itija ħo~u. o~unini a takarawaj ko~u tirəŋ, paɬ~ɮaka ko~u pisiŋ ato~u mata kasənaŋan a sinpo~u~u, tariktikaj ko~u wakawak, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kaɾakapaħan ʡo~urip mapaʦakat itini i pasawaɾi, ŋaɾəf itiniaj i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ kanataɾ tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. ʦi o~uo~u~u tinto~usi (b~b~vro~u. b~b~vo~u~uʦħəɾ ao~u~u*o~u~ustin) ʡajaw no~u ɾato~usa no~u siʦi (**** miħəʦa) itira i faɾaŋaw tinso~ukiw pataɬ~ɮo~u ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u, ʦaaj ko~u ni ħajɬ~ɮaan no~u kafafaw, ɾo~uno~uk sa paka takao~u mikaɾiʦ to~u tamina tajra i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ saan, itini i nəŋnəŋ no~u pajraŋ, o~u maʦaħiwaj ko~umaənaj to~u rəŋo~us ko~u finawɾan, o~u makaɬ~ɮaɾaj a paɾa. o~u nisiɬ~ɮajan a sajiŋ a nəŋnəŋən, o~u kaɾakapaħan no~u sinpo~u~u o~u kakao~uɾaħan no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ a finawɾan. ira ko~u pinapina a sajiŋ to~u pisatamo~uħo~uŋ ato~u pisariko~uʡ niŋra to~u no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan a masasiʡajaw to~u mato~uʡasaj, masasiso~uŋto~uɾ to~u ŋo~uso~uʡ a matatakəʦ pasjasiŋ. iko~ur no~u ** miħəʦaan, o~u piħəmak to~u kafanaʡ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj saʡətaɾ to~u *** miħəʦaan, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʦikiw maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miħaratəŋ: o~u piʦiŋʦiŋ ato~u papo~utaɾaj a pito~uo~uran o~u maan ko~u sakatatiiħ no~u po~unka no~u itiraaj? o~uʦi so~uʡəɾinaj mapaɬ~ɮama ko~u pako~ujo~uʦaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan? ħaɾo~u tajwan a maso~uwaɾ. faŋʦaɾ ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u pasawaɾi a tamɬ~ɮaw (maŋaɾəf iʡajawaj a tao~u a tamɬ~ɮaw) saki ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~uan, ʦaaj ko~uja ni patənakan niŋra a pipaʡo~urip ni kristo~u a rato~uħ, o~uja ŋaʡajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~unini kapaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw. miɬ~ɮama ʦiŋra to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, mapapaɾo~u to~u so~ufitaj aʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u, o~u kaʡəɬ~ɮəsan piʡəpəʦan no~u sifo~u itija i, o~u kakətəran no~u paɬ~ɮaka ato~u so~ufitaj o~u masamaanaj ħakija? "maəɬ~ɮəŋaj to~u ko~u pipafəɾi, ʦaaj to~u ko~u papafəɾiən." o~u sawaɾ ni o~uo~u~u tinto~usi kai kaɾaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj niŋra itija i, kinapinapina masasito~uʦ to~unini a ʦaajaj pikiħar, nawħani ħo~uniħo~uni miaɾa to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ patajra i papo~utaɾ, ro~uma markətər to~u ʦi o~uo~u~u tinto~usi to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmakan, ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u sato~u paʡafaɾa saan, "o~u papafəɾi to~u ko~u kawas titaanan." saħatira saʦa ko~u paʦaʡo~uf. ** miħəʦaan itija, ʡajaw no~u tiŋso~ukiwkaj i saka to~usa no~u b~vatiʦan a saʡo~upo~u o~u masiməɬ~ɮ ħo~u, awaaj ħo~u ko~u mafanaʡaj to~u no~u ɾatiŋ a pakajraan, o~u sifanaʡ sa ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan misaʦəʦaj miwasiɾ. marikəʦ ko~u sifanaʡ a maʡəɬ~ɮəs, o~uni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u pikəriɬ~ɮ to~u misa mato~u mafo~uħataj, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tao~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saʡajaw ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u i ɾanjo~u~u a mafo~uħat, piɾajapan to~u əpaŋ itija i, ano~u mito~uo~uraj to~u ano~u kafaħəkaan? maŋaɾaj sapiɾajapan, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u pafəɾi ʦaŋraan. i nəŋnəŋ niŋra, ʦi kristo~u o~u no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, awaaj ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡaj papo~utaɾaj sanaj pisiikəɬ~ɮ, o~u nipataɬ~ɮo~uan niŋra maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u. ro~uma; mikiħatija ʦiŋra to~u ɾisin no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan (tinako~u pifo~utiŋan, patəfaɬ~ɮan to~u tamina a ɾisin), o~uja ʦaajaj faɾiʦən a to~uʡək ɾəkakawa ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa to~u no~u itiniaj nijaro~uʡ a po~unka ko~u pisaɾo~uf. ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u nai **** miħəʦa itini i ɾanjo~u~u pataɬ~ɮo~u ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan niŋra. to~uja a jinʦo~u~umin (tano~u paʦaʦo~uj sa ko~u faʡinajan no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan) ni əpəʦan a to~uʡək miħəʦaan itija, paɾo~u nijaħ a saɾikaka saan ko~u nəŋnəŋ ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u. kinapinapina kanikawan to~u kakaənən ko~u tao~u finawɾan paɾaɬ~ɮaʡən ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi sa ko~u ʦaʡo~uf to~u finawɾan: "kako~u ko~u misakimo~ukimo~uraj." saan mitamo~uro~uŋ. papaʦakatan to~u kiwkaj no~u ħo~uŋto~u i **** miħəʦaan, pakajniən niŋra i ro~uʦo~uk ko~u piħamħam to~u ɾafan a mipaʡəɬ~ɮap, ʦaaj pinaʡo~un ko~u kamaro~uʡ i ʡanəŋan a mapo~uɾin, o~u pinəŋnəŋ no~u ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a mato~uʡasaj, o~u ʦaajaj ko~u ŋaʡajaj saan. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saki saɾikaka no~u tao~u a so~uwaɾ, o~u kapaɬ~ɮəsan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja misəra to~u tato~usaaj fafaħijan tajra i saətip matajaɾ, itira i takao~u o~u nai ʦiajiaj misəra to~u ɾafaŋ a ħaja, to~u ɬ~ɮafak, ** ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra itija. pipaisiŋan makiɾim ko~u i tatirəŋan niŋra ko~u ʦaɾaj, itija masapinaŋ to~u o~u sinpo~u~u ko~u tirəŋ niŋra, o~uja masaɾafiiaj ʦaaj ka fo~utiʡ mato~ukato~u parakataj masəto~uɾ ko~u kiɾaŋ i ɾaɾan, ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u masəra patajra i ŋataaj isiŋ a mapataj, ** ko~u miħəʦaan itija. o~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak mapatajra to~u i pasawaɾi, ŋaɾəf o~u itiraaj i tao~u a saɾikaka, mararo~um to~u maəmin, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u saɾikaka no~u tinso~ukiw i ħo~uŋto~u mito~uɾo~un to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, itiraaj a sifo~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u fajfaj mitaʡo~uŋ. kaħəməkan kao~uɾaħən no~u itiraaj i ɾanjo~u~u a saɾikaka ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u "o~u mama no~u ɾanjo~u~u" saan ko~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u. maħiratəŋ naŋra, o~unini nai swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw mikapo~utaj paɾipaħak ato~u mararo~um mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kapaɬ~ɮəsan, miɾijaŋ to~u misamsamaj ato~u miəpəʦaj, o~u nianan ko~u kaŋaʡajan no~unini a sinpo~u~u ʦiħəraŋ, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u saka ʦi tariʡan ato~u safaɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nijaħ. kapataj ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u, mataɬ~ɮəm i piwħo~u saiko~uran no~u kiwkaj, mapatirəŋ ko~u ʦiwʦika, o~u ŋaŋan ato~u kaso~ufo~uʦan ato~u kapatajan ko~u matiɾiɬ~ɮaj, awaj to~u ko~u maan. miɾiʦaj kako~u ʦi wo~u tinto~usian: "o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra kija? mana ħatini sa ko~u taɬ~ɮəm niŋra?" "o~u maɾawɾaaj ko~u katajni pinakaj, awaajaj ko~u maan a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra i." saħatira sa ko~u paʦaʡo~uf ni wo~u tinto~usi.
S.FORM: == Ci Sucang sinpu == O mama no Fotod ci Ci Sucang sinpu (Fr .Giger, Alfred. 1919-1970), o no Payleng wayfang dintokay Switzerland a tadamaanay tamdaw itiya ho. Onini a takaraway ko tireng, Padaka ko pising ato mata kasenangan a sinpu, tariktikay ko wakawak, o polong no kalakapahan 'orip mapacakat itini i pasawali, ngalef itiniay i Fotod kanatal Tao finacadan. Ci Ou tintosi (Bro. Buchel Augustin) 'ayaw no latosa no sici (1954 miheca) itira i Falangaw Tinsokiw patado ci Ci Sucang sinpu, caay ko ni haydaan no kafafaw, lonok sa paka Takao mikalic to tamina tayra i Fotod saan, itini i nengneng no Payrang, o macahiway komaenay to rengos ko finawlan, o makadalay a pala. O nisidayan a saying a nengnengen, o kalakapahan no sinpu o kakaolahan no Fotod a finawlan. Ira ko pinapina a saying to pisatamohong ato pisariko' ningra to no Fotod finacadan a lalosidan a masasi'ayaw to mato'asay, masasisongtol to ngoso' a matatakec pasyasing. Ikor no 80 mihecaan, o pihemak to kafana' to fa'elohay sa'etal to 500 mihecaan, polong no cikiw madadoedo miharateng: o picingcing ato papotalay a pitooran o maan ko sakatatiih no ponka no itiraay? Oci so'elinay mapadama ko pakoyocay a finacadan? Halo Taywan a masowal. Fangcal ko harateng no pasawali a tamdaw (mangalef I'ayaway a Tao a tamdaw) saki ci Ci Sucang sinpuan, caay koya ni patenakan ningra a pipa'orip ni Kristo a ratoh, oya nga'ayay a demak nonini kapah a tamdaw. Midama cingra to sakanga'ay no Tao finacadan, mapapalo to sofitay aci Ci Sucang sinpu, o ka'edesan pi'epecan no sifo itiya i, o kaketeran no Padaka ato sofitay o masamaanay hakiya? "Maedengay to ko pipafeli, caay to ko papafelien." O sawal ni Ou tintosi kai kalacitodongay ningra itiya i, kinapinapina masasitoc tonini a caayay pikihar, nawhani honihoni miala to dafong patayra i papotal, roma marketer to ci Ou tintosi tonini a demakan, Ci Sucang sinpu sato pa'afala saan, "O papafeli to ko Kawas titaanan." Sahatira saca ko paca'of. 60 mihecaan itiya, 'ayaw no Tingsokiwkay i saka tosa no Vatican a sa'opo o masimed ho, awaay ho ko mafana'ay to no Lating a pakayraan, o sifana' sa ko pido'edoan misacecay miwasil. Marikec ko sifana' a ma'edes, oni Ci Sucang sinpu pikerid to Misa mato mafohatay, midotoc to sowal no Tao tamdaw, sa'ayaw ni Ci Sucang sinpu i Lanyu a mafohat, pilayapan to epang itiya i, ano mitooray to ano kafahekaan? Mangalay sapilayapan, patodongen ni Ci Sucang sinpu pafeli cangraan. I nengneng ningra, ci Kristo o no 'alomanay tamdaw, awaay ko laloma'ay papotalay sanay pisiiked, o nipatadoan ningra malecaday to. Roma; mikihatiya cingra to lisin no Tao finacadan (tinako pifotingan, patefadan to tamina a lisin), oya caayay falicen a to'ek lekakawa doedo sa to no itiniay niyaro' a ponka ko pisalof. Ci Ci Sucang sinpu nai 1954 miheca itini i Lanyu patado ira ko 16 mihecaan ningra. Toya a yincumin (tano pacacoy sa ko fa'inayan no Tao finacadan) ni epecan a to'ek mihecaan itiya, palo niyah a salikaka saan ko nengneng ni Ci Sucang sinpu. Kinapinapina kanikawan to kakaenen ko Tao finawlan palada'en ni Ci Sucang sinpu, hadidi sa ko ca'of to finawlan: "Kako ko misakimokimoray." saan mitamorong. Papacakatan to kiwkay no Hongto i 1967 mihecaan, pakaynien ningra i rocok ko pihamham to lafan a mipa'edap, caay pina'on ko kamaro' i 'anengan a mapolin, o pinengneng no dotoc a mato'asay, o caayay ko nga'ayay saan. 1970 miheca 3 folad 10 romi'ad, saki salikaka no Tao a sowal, o kapadesan a romi'ad. Ci Ci Sucang sinpu padadaya misera to tatosaay fafahiyan tayra i saetip matayal, itira i Takao o nai Ciayiay misera to lafang a haya, to dafak, 50 ko mihecaan ningra itiya. pipaisingan makilim ko i tatirengan ningra ko calay, itiya masapinang to o sinpu ko tireng ningra, oya masalafiiay caay ka foti' matokato parakatay masetol ko kilang i lalan, ci Ci Sucang sinpu masera patayra i ngataay ising a mapatay, 50 ko mihecaan itiya. Onini a demak mapatayra to i pasawali, ngalef o itiraay i Tao a salikaka, mararom to maemin, polong no salikaka no Tinsokiw i Hongto mitolon tonini a demak, itiraay a sifo citodongay mingodo mitefad to fayfay mita'ong. Kahemekan kaolahen no itiraay i Lanyu a salikaka ci Ci Sucang sinpu "O mama no Lanyu" saan ko pingodo. Mahirateng nangra, onini nai Switzerland a tamdaw mikapotay palipahak ato mararom mikerid to kapadesan, miliyang to misamsamay ato miepecay, o nianan ko kanga'ayan nonini a sinpu ciherang, palowad to saka ci tari'an ato safaloco' no niyah. Kapatay ni Ci Sucang sinpu, matadem i Piwho saikoran no kiwkay, mapatireng ko ciwcika, o ngangan ato kasofocan ato kapatayan ko matiliday, away to ko maan. Milicay kako ci Wo tintosian: "O tadamaanay tamdaw cingra kiya? Mana hatini sa ko tadem ningra?" "O malawlaay ko katayni pinakay, awaayay ko maan a tamdaw cingra i." sahatira sa ko paca'of ni Wo tintosi.
S.PHON: == ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u == o~u mama no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u (fr .*i*ər, aɾfrəɬ~ɮ. ****-****), o~u no~u pajɾəŋ wajfaŋ ɬ~ɮinto~ukaj swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw itija ħo~u. o~unini a takarawaj ko~u tirəŋ, paɬ~ɮaka ko~u pisiŋ ato~u mata kasənaŋan a sinpo~u~u, tariktikaj ko~u wakawak, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kaɾakapaħan ʡo~urip mapaʦakat itini i pasawaɾi, ŋaɾəf itiniaj i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ kanataɾ tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan. ʦi o~uo~u~u tinto~usi (b~b~vro~u. b~b~vo~u~uʦħəɾ ao~u~u*o~u~ustin) ʡajaw no~u ɾato~usa no~u siʦi (**** miħəʦa) itira i faɾaŋaw tinso~ukiw pataɬ~ɮo~u ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u, ʦaaj ko~u ni ħajɬ~ɮaan no~u kafafaw, ɾo~uno~uk sa paka takao~u mikaɾiʦ to~u tamina tajra i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ saan, itini i nəŋnəŋ no~u pajraŋ, o~u maʦaħiwaj ko~umaənaj to~u rəŋo~us ko~u finawɾan, o~u makaɬ~ɮaɾaj a paɾa. o~u nisiɬ~ɮajan a sajiŋ a nəŋnəŋən, o~u kaɾakapaħan no~u sinpo~u~u o~u kakao~uɾaħan no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ a finawɾan. ira ko~u pinapina a sajiŋ to~u pisatamo~uħo~uŋ ato~u pisariko~uʡ niŋra to~u no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan a masasiʡajaw to~u mato~uʡasaj, masasiso~uŋto~uɾ to~u ŋo~uso~uʡ a matatakəʦ pasjasiŋ. iko~ur no~u ** miħəʦaan, o~u piħəmak to~u kafanaʡ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj saʡətaɾ to~u *** miħəʦaan, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʦikiw maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miħaratəŋ: o~u piʦiŋʦiŋ ato~u papo~utaɾaj a pito~uo~uran o~u maan ko~u sakatatiiħ no~u po~unka no~u itiraaj? o~uʦi so~uʡəɾinaj mapaɬ~ɮama ko~u pako~ujo~uʦaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan? ħaɾo~u tajwan a maso~uwaɾ. faŋʦaɾ ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u pasawaɾi a tamɬ~ɮaw (maŋaɾəf iʡajawaj a tao~u a tamɬ~ɮaw) saki ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~uan, ʦaaj ko~uja ni patənakan niŋra a pipaʡo~urip ni kristo~u a rato~uħ, o~uja ŋaʡajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~unini kapaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw. miɬ~ɮama ʦiŋra to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, mapapaɾo~u to~u so~ufitaj aʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u, o~u kaʡəɬ~ɮəsan piʡəpəʦan no~u sifo~u itija i, o~u kakətəran no~u paɬ~ɮaka ato~u so~ufitaj o~u masamaanaj ħakija? "maəɬ~ɮəŋaj to~u ko~u pipafəɾi, ʦaaj to~u ko~u papafəɾiən." o~u sawaɾ ni o~uo~u~u tinto~usi kai kaɾaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj niŋra itija i, kinapinapina masasito~uʦ to~unini a ʦaajaj pikiħar, nawħani ħo~uniħo~uni miaɾa to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ patajra i papo~utaɾ, ro~uma markətər to~u ʦi o~uo~u~u tinto~usi to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmakan, ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u sato~u paʡafaɾa saan, "o~u papafəɾi to~u ko~u kawas titaanan." saħatira saʦa ko~u paʦaʡo~uf. ** miħəʦaan itija, ʡajaw no~u tiŋso~ukiwkaj i saka to~usa no~u b~vatiʦan a saʡo~upo~u o~u masiməɬ~ɮ ħo~u, awaaj ħo~u ko~u mafanaʡaj to~u no~u ɾatiŋ a pakajraan, o~u sifanaʡ sa ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan misaʦəʦaj miwasiɾ. marikəʦ ko~u sifanaʡ a maʡəɬ~ɮəs, o~uni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u pikəriɬ~ɮ to~u misa mato~u mafo~uħataj, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tao~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saʡajaw ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u i ɾanjo~u~u a mafo~uħat, piɾajapan to~u əpaŋ itija i, ano~u mito~uo~uraj to~u ano~u kafaħəkaan? maŋaɾaj sapiɾajapan, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u pafəɾi ʦaŋraan. i nəŋnəŋ niŋra, ʦi kristo~u o~u no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, awaaj ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡaj papo~utaɾaj sanaj pisiikəɬ~ɮ, o~u nipataɬ~ɮo~uan niŋra maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u. ro~uma; mikiħatija ʦiŋra to~u ɾisin no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan (tinako~u pifo~utiŋan, patəfaɬ~ɮan to~u tamina a ɾisin), o~uja ʦaajaj faɾiʦən a to~uʡək ɾəkakawa ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa to~u no~u itiniaj nijaro~uʡ a po~unka ko~u pisaɾo~uf. ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u nai **** miħəʦa itini i ɾanjo~u~u pataɬ~ɮo~u ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan niŋra. to~uja a jinʦo~u~umin (tano~u paʦaʦo~uj sa ko~u faʡinajan no~u tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan) ni əpəʦan a to~uʡək miħəʦaan itija, paɾo~u nijaħ a saɾikaka saan ko~u nəŋnəŋ ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u. kinapinapina kanikawan to~u kakaənən ko~u tao~u finawɾan paɾaɬ~ɮaʡən ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi sa ko~u ʦaʡo~uf to~u finawɾan: "kako~u ko~u misakimo~ukimo~uraj." saan mitamo~uro~uŋ. papaʦakatan to~u kiwkaj no~u ħo~uŋto~u i **** miħəʦaan, pakajniən niŋra i ro~uʦo~uk ko~u piħamħam to~u ɾafan a mipaʡəɬ~ɮap, ʦaaj pinaʡo~un ko~u kamaro~uʡ i ʡanəŋan a mapo~uɾin, o~u pinəŋnəŋ no~u ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a mato~uʡasaj, o~u ʦaajaj ko~u ŋaʡajaj saan. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saki saɾikaka no~u tao~u a so~uwaɾ, o~u kapaɬ~ɮəsan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja misəra to~u tato~usaaj fafaħijan tajra i saətip matajaɾ, itira i takao~u o~u nai ʦiajiaj misəra to~u ɾafaŋ a ħaja, to~u ɬ~ɮafak, ** ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra itija. pipaisiŋan makiɾim ko~u i tatirəŋan niŋra ko~u ʦaɾaj, itija masapinaŋ to~u o~u sinpo~u~u ko~u tirəŋ niŋra, o~uja masaɾafiiaj ʦaaj ka fo~utiʡ mato~ukato~u parakataj masəto~uɾ ko~u kiɾaŋ i ɾaɾan, ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u masəra patajra i ŋataaj isiŋ a mapataj, ** ko~u miħəʦaan itija. o~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak mapatajra to~u i pasawaɾi, ŋaɾəf o~u itiraaj i tao~u a saɾikaka, mararo~um to~u maəmin, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u saɾikaka no~u tinso~ukiw i ħo~uŋto~u mito~uɾo~un to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, itiraaj a sifo~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u fajfaj mitaʡo~uŋ. kaħəməkan kao~uɾaħən no~u itiraaj i ɾanjo~u~u a saɾikaka ʦi ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u "o~u mama no~u ɾanjo~u~u" saan ko~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u. maħiratəŋ naŋra, o~unini nai swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw mikapo~utaj paɾipaħak ato~u mararo~um mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kapaɬ~ɮəsan, miɾijaŋ to~u misamsamaj ato~u miəpəʦaj, o~u nianan ko~u kaŋaʡajan no~unini a sinpo~u~u ʦiħəraŋ, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u saka ʦi tariʡan ato~u safaɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nijaħ. kapataj ni ʦi so~u~uʦaŋ sinpo~u~u, mataɬ~ɮəm i piwħo~u saiko~uran no~u kiwkaj, mapatirəŋ ko~u ʦiwʦika, o~u ŋaŋan ato~u kaso~ufo~uʦan ato~u kapatajan ko~u matiɾiɬ~ɮaj, awaj to~u ko~u maan. miɾiʦaj kako~u ʦi wo~u tinto~usian: "o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra kija? mana ħatini sa ko~u taɬ~ɮəm niŋra?" "o~u maɾawɾaaj ko~u katajni pinakaj, awaajaj ko~u maan a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra i." saħatira sa ko~u paʦaʡo~uf ni wo~u tinto~usi.
